### 🧠 Project Philosophy Check

Does this PR follow the core principles?

* [ ] Local-first (no external APIs/services)
* [ ] Anonymous (no authentication/tracking)
* [ ] Lightweight (no heavy dependencies)

---

### 🧪 Testing

* [ ] App runs without errors
* [ ] Tested in development mode (`npm run dev`)
* [ ] Tested in production mode (`npm run build` + `node server.js`)
* [ ] Messaging works correctly
* [ ] Reconnect logic works
* [ ] UI works on mobile + desktop
* [ ] Dark/light mode unaffected

---

* [ ] No sensitive data exposure
* [ ] Input is properly sanitized
* [ ] No new vulnerabilities introduced

* [ ] No new dependencies added
